pages.text:
INDUSTRIAL EQUIPMENT DATASHEET AND PROCEDURES
Document Ref: SOP-2023 / Section 4(12)
Date of Issue: 2024-01-01
Author: Sr. Engineer Rao
Department: Maintenance and Safety
1. Equipment Specifications:
- Tag Name: Pump P-101 (Centrifugal pump for water transfer)
- Alternate Designator: P/101
- Operating Limit: Max speed 3000 RPM
- Mounting Bolt Torque: Recommended torque for Pump P-101 is 45 Nm.
2. Safety Procedures:
- Before starting Pump P-101, ensure lockout-tagout is complete.
- Governed by regulation OISD 105 and Section 4(12) of safety manual.
- General guidelines follow Factory Act protocols.
3. Incident Logs:
- On 2024-01-01, an incident occurred where a seal failed on Pump P-101.
- Sr. Engineer Rao inspected the unit and noticed a gap.
- Resolved by maintenance technician J. Doe, who replaced the seals.
